name: MRH21-IRF
scope: Engineering survey and topographic mapping for railway applications.
area: United Kingdom (UK) - on or related to Midland Rail Hub, covering routes through Cardiff, Bristol, Gloucester, Derby, Birmingham, Leicester, and Lincoln.
remarks: Intermediate CRS created in 2021 to assist the emulation of the ETRS89 / MRH21 SnakeGrid projected CRS through transformation ETRS89-GBR [OSNet v2009] to MRH21-IRF (1) (code 9867) used in conjunction with the MRH21-TM map projection (code 9868).
